div.p: simd_strlen and simd_memchr — SSE2 Optimized Byte Search

g.text: simd_memchr(const void* s, int c, size_t n) → void*

div.p: Mathematical Guarantee: Page size P = 4096 = 2¹² bytes Vector size V = 16 = 2⁴ bytes P = 256 × V Aligned address A: A mod 16 = 0 Load spans [A, A+15] Since P is multiple of V, aligned load cannot cross page boundary.

ol.li: All SIMD loads use aligned addresses _mm_load_si128 on 16-byte aligned ptr
movemask + ctz for position Branch-free first-match detection
memchr respects size limit Never reads past n bytes

div.p: Color Key: 🟣 Purple — Header/Module 🔵 Blue — SIMD Operations 🟢 Green — Pointer/Address Handling 🟡 Yellow — Utility/Result Processing
__m128i — 128-bit integer vector _mm_cmpeq_epi8 — parallel byte compare _mm_movemask_epi8 — extract high bits _mm_set1_epi8 — broadcast byte _mm_setzero_si128 — zero vector
ignore_mask = (1U << offset) - 1 Mask out bytes before str start
_mm_load_si128(aligned_addr) Safe: Aligned reads cannot cross page boundaries
_mm_cmpeq_epi8(chunk, zero) 16 parallel byte comparisons Match → 0xFF, No match → 0x00
mask = _mm_movemask_epi8(cmp) Extract high bit from each byte Result: 16-bit bitmask
mask >>= offset Align mask to string start
__builtin_ctz(mask) Count trailing zeros = first null terminator position
position = (p - str) + ctz(mask) Offset from string start
Scalar search until aligned or until n exhausted prologue_bytes = MIN(16-offset, n)
target = _mm_set1_epi8((char)c) Broadcast search byte to all 16 vector lanes
Loop while n >= 16 Process 16 bytes per iteration n -= 16 after each
Scalar epilogue for remaining 0-15 bytes Return NULL if not found
